name: HP5 Plus
exposureLatitude: EI 400/27 box speed; usable at meter settings EI 400/27 to EI 3200/36 with extended development
notes: ISO 400/27. 35mm on 0.125mm acetate; 120 on 0.110mm acetate; sheet on 0.180mm polyester. Reciprocity Ta=Tm^1.31. Datasheet Nov 2018.

name: FP4 Plus
exposureLatitude: EI 125/22 box speed; good image quality EI 50/18 to EI 200/24; tolerates +6 stops over / -2 stops under
notes: ISO 125/22 (measured in ID-11). 35mm on 0.125mm acetate; 120 on 0.110mm acetate; sheet on 0.180mm polyester. Reciprocity Ta=Tm^1.26. Datasheet Nov 2018.

name: Pan F Plus
exposureLatitude: EI 50/18 box speed; good image quality also at EI 25/15
notes: ISO 50/18 (measured in ID-11). 35mm on 0.125mm acetate; 120 on 0.110mm acetate. Reciprocity Ta=Tm^1.33. Process within 3 months of exposure. Datasheet Dec 2018.

name: Delta 100
exposureLatitude: EI 100/21 box speed; good image quality EI 50/18 to EI 200/24
notes: ISO 100/21. Full product name Delta 100 Professional. 35mm on 0.125mm acetate; 120 on 0.110mm acetate; sheet on 0.180mm polyester. Reciprocity Ta=Tm^1.26. Datasheet Apr 2023.

name: Delta 400
exposureLatitude: EI 400/27 box speed; good image quality EI 200/24 to EI 3200/36 with extended development
notes: ISO 400/27 (measured in ID-11). Full product name Delta 400 Professional. 35mm on 0.125mm acetate; 120 on 0.110mm acetate. Normal contrast Gbar 0.62. Reciprocity Ta=Tm^1.41. Datasheet Nov 2018.

name: Delta 3200
exposureLatitude: Designed for EI 3200/36; good image quality EI 400/27 to EI 6400/39; usable up to EI 25000/45
notes: Box EI 3200/36; measured ISO speed 1000/31 to daylight (ID-11). Full product name Delta 3200 Professional. 35mm on 0.125mm acetate; 120 roll film. Reciprocity Ta=Tm^1.33. Datasheet Jun 2025.

name: XP2 Super
exposureLatitude: EI 400/27 box speed; usable EI 50/18 to EI 800/30; finer grain when overexposed/downrated
notes: ISO 400/27 chromogenic black-and-white film processed in standard C41. 35mm on 0.125mm acetate; 120 on 0.110mm acetate. Push processing not recommended. Reciprocity Ta=Tm^1.31. Datasheet Nov 2018.

name: SFX 200
exposureLatitude: EI 200/24 box speed; extended red sensitivity up to 740nm
notes: ISO 200/24 (measured in ID-11). Extended red sensitivity to 740nm plus full panchromatic sensitivity. Coated on 0.125mm grey acetate base. Datasheet Nov 2018.

name: Ortho Plus
exposureLatitude: ISO 80/20 daylight, ISO 40/17 tungsten; 135 cassettes DX coded ISO 80
notes: Orthochromatic (blue/green sensitive, no red). ISO 80/20 daylight, ISO 40/17 tungsten. 35mm and 120 on 0.125mm acetate; sheet on 0.180mm polyester. Deep-red safelight usable (ILFORD 906). Reciprocity Ta=Tm^1.25. Datasheet Oct 2019.

name: Kentmere Pan 100
exposureLatitude: EI 100/21 box speed; development times given for EI 50/18 to EI 200/24
notes: ISO 100/21 (measured in ID-11). Coated on 0.125mm acetate base; 135 and 120. Reciprocity Ta=Tm^1.26. Datasheet Jul 2022.

name: Kentmere Pan 400
exposureLatitude: EI 400/27 box speed; development times given for EI 320/26 to EI 800/30
notes: ISO 400/27 (measured in ID-11). Coated on 0.125mm acetate base; 135 and 120. Reciprocity Ta=Tm^1.30. Datasheet Jul 2022.

name: Harman Phoenix 200
exposureLatitude: ISO 200/24 box speed; best results EI 100-200, many users prefer EI 160
notes: Experimental ISO 200/24 C41 colour negative. High contrast, strong grain, no orange mask, limited antihalation (halation effects). Coated on 0.125mm acetate; 135 and 120. Push processing not recommended. Reciprocity Ta=Tm^1.31. Datasheet Sep 2024.

name: Harman Phoenix II
exposureLatitude: ISO 200/24 box speed; best results EI 100-200; wider latitude than original Phoenix
notes: 2nd-generation experimental ISO 200/24 C41 colour negative. More normal contrast/colour, finer grain than Phoenix 200; no orange mask. Coated on 0.125mm acetate; 135 and 120. Push processing not recommended. Reciprocity Ta=Tm^1.31. Datasheet Jul 2025.

name: Harman Red 125
exposureLatitude: EI 125 nominal; usable range EI 50-400; best results EI 100-200
notes: C41-process redscale film (name on datasheet: HARMAN Red). EI 125/22 daylight (practical evaluation). Emulsion reversed/outermost - reverse orientation for processing. Coated on 0.125mm acetate; DX coded ISO 125; 135 and 120. Push processing not recommended. Datasheet Jun 2025.
